policy_document:
EXL BANK LIMITED - PRODUCT POLICY DOCUMENT
Product: EXL Griha Home Loan (HL-GRIHA)
Category: Home Loan

1. ELIGIBILITY CRITERIA
   - Age: 23 to 65 years
   - Minimum annual income: Rs.500,000
   - Minimum CIBIL score: 700
   - Eligible employment: Salaried, Self-Employed, Business
   - Maximum loan-to-value (LTV): 90.0%
   - Maximum FOIR (obligations to income): 55.0%

2. REQUIRED DOCUMENTS
   - PAN & Aadhaar
   - Latest 6 months bank statement
   - Salary slips / ITR (2 years)
   - Property documents & sale agreement
   - Passport-size photographs

3. TERMS & CONDITIONS
   - Property must be approved / within municipal limits
   - Applicant age + tenure must not exceed 70 years at maturity
   - Minimum 3 years of continuous employment or business vintage

4. MANDATORY DISCLOSURES (as per RBI / IRDAI norms)
   - Interest rate is floating and linked to RBI repo rate; EMIs may change with repo revisions.
   - Processing fee is non-refundable once the loan is sanctioned.
   - Property is mortgaged to EXL Bank until full repayment.

This document is indicative and for internal sales enablement use only.

policy_document:
EXL BANK LIMITED - PRODUCT POLICY DOCUMENT
Product: EXL Insta Personal Loan (PL-INSTA)
Category: Personal Loan

1. ELIGIBILITY CRITERIA
   - Age: 21 to 60 years
   - Minimum annual income: Rs.300,000
   - Minimum CIBIL score: 720
   - Eligible employment: Salaried, Self-Employed
   - Maximum FOIR (obligations to income): 50.0%

2. REQUIRED DOCUMENTS
   - PAN & Aadhaar
   - Latest 3 months salary slips
   - Last 6 months bank statement

3. TERMS & CONDITIONS
   - Minimum net monthly income of Rs.25,000
   - Minimum 1 year in current job
   - No active loan default in credit history

4. MANDATORY DISCLOSURES (as per RBI / IRDAI norms)
   - Personal loans carry a higher rate of interest than secured loans.
   - Late payment attracts penal charges of 2% per month on overdue amount.
   - Foreclosure charges of up to 4% apply if closed before 12 EMIs.

This document is indicative and for internal sales enablement use only.

EXL BANK LIMITED - PRODUCT POLICY DOCUMENT
Product: EXL Drive Car Loan (CL-DRIVE)
Category: Car Loan

1. ELIGIBILITY CRITERIA
   - Age: 21 to 65 years
   - Minimum annual income: Rs.400,000
   - Minimum CIBIL score: 700
   - Eligible employment: Salaried, Self-Employed, Business
   - Maximum loan-to-value (LTV): 100.0%
   - Maximum FOIR (obligations to income): 50.0%

2. REQUIRED DOCUMENTS
   - PAN & Aadhaar
   - Income proof (salary slips / ITR)
   - Bank statement (6 months)
   - Proforma invoice of the vehicle

3. TERMS & CONDITIONS
   - Vehicle hypothecated to EXL Bank until loan closure
   - Comprehensive motor insurance mandatory for loan tenure

4. MANDATORY DISCLOSURES (as per RBI / IRDAI norms)

   - On-road funding percentage varies by model and applicant profile.

mandatory_disclosures: ["Finance charges up to 3.75% per month (46% p.a.) apply on revolving balances.", "Paying only the minimum amount due extends repayment and increases interest cost.", "Cash withdrawals attract a cash-advance fee and interest from day one."]
policy_document:
EXL BANK LIMITED - PRODUCT POLICY DOCUMENT
Product: EXL Platinum Credit Card (CC-PLAT)
Category: Credit Card

1. ELIGIBILITY CRITERIA
   - Age: 21 to 60 years
   - Minimum annual income: Rs.360,000
   - Minimum CIBIL score: 750
   - Eligible employment: Salaried, Self-Employed, Business

2. REQUIRED DOCUMENTS
   - PAN & Aadhaar
   - Income proof
   - Address proof

3. TERMS & CONDITIONS
   - Annual fee waived on annual spends above Rs.1.5 lakh
   - Credit limit assigned basis income and bureau score

4. MANDATORY DISCLOSURES (as per RBI / IRDAI norms)
   - Finance charges up to 3.75% per month (46% p.a.) apply on revolving balances.
   - Paying only the minimum amount due extends repayment and increases interest cost.
   - Cash withdrawals attract a cash-advance fee and interest from day one.

This document is indicative and for internal sales enablement use only.

policy_document:
EXL BANK LIMITED - PRODUCT POLICY DOCUMENT
Product: EXL Signature Credit Card (CC-SIGN)
Category: Credit Card

1. ELIGIBILITY CRITERIA
   - Age: 25 to 65 years
   - Minimum annual income: Rs.1,500,000
   - Minimum CIBIL score: 770
   - Eligible employment: Salaried, Self-Employed, Business

2. REQUIRED DOCUMENTS
   - PAN & Aadhaar
   - Income proof (ITR / Form 16)
   - Address proof

3. TERMS & CONDITIONS
   - Annual fee waived on annual spends above Rs.5 lakh
   - Reserved for Affluent and HNI segment customers

4. MANDATORY DISCLOSURES (as per RBI / IRDAI norms)
   - Finance charges up to 3.75% per month (46% p.a.) apply on revolving balances.
   - Forex markup of 2% applies on international transactions.

This document is indicative and for internal sales enablement use only.

mandatory_disclosures: ["Premature withdrawal attracts a penalty of 0.50% - 1.00% on the applicable rate.", "Deposit insurance by DICGC covers up to Rs.5 lakh per depositor.", "Interest income is taxable as per your income-tax slab."]
policy_document:
EXL BANK LIMITED - PRODUCT POLICY DOCUMENT
Product: EXL Smart Fixed Deposit (FD-SMART)
Category: Fixed Deposit

1. ELIGIBILITY CRITERIA
   - Age: 18 to 100 years
   - Eligible employment: Salaried, Self-Employed, Business, Retired, Homemaker, Student
   - Minimum balance / deposit: Rs.10,000

2. REQUIRED DOCUMENTS
   - PAN & Aadhaar
   - KYC documents

3. TERMS & CONDITIONS
   - Minimum deposit Rs.10,000
   - TDS applicable if interest exceeds Rs.40,000 per year (Rs.50,000 for seniors)

4. MANDATORY DISCLOSURES (as per RBI / IRDAI norms)
   - Premature withdrawal attracts a penalty of 0.50% - 1.00% on the applicable rate.
   - Deposit insurance by DICGC covers up to Rs.5 lakh per depositor.
   - Interest income is taxable as per your income-tax slab.

This document is indicative and for internal sales enablement use only.

policy_document:
EXL BANK LIMITED - PRODUCT POLICY DOCUMENT
Product: EXL Wealth Savings Account (SA-WEALTH)
Category: Savings

1. ELIGIBILITY CRITERIA
   - Age: 18 to 100 years
   - Minimum annual income: Rs.1,000,000
   - Eligible employment: Salaried, Self-Employed, Business, Retired
   - Minimum balance / deposit: Rs.100,000

2. REQUIRED DOCUMENTS
   - PAN & Aadhaar
   - Address proof
   - Photographs

3. TERMS & CONDITIONS
   - Average monthly balance of Rs.1,00,000 required
   - Non-maintenance attracts monthly charges

4. MANDATORY DISCLOSURES (as per RBI / IRDAI norms)
   - Failure to maintain the average monthly balance attracts non-maintenance charges.
   - Interest is calculated on daily balance and paid quarterly.

This document is indicative and for internal sales enablement use only.

EXL BANK LIMITED - PRODUCT POLICY DOCUMENT
Product: EXL Suraksha Term Life Insurance (INS-LIFE)
Category: Insurance

1. ELIGIBILITY CRITERIA
   - Age: 18 to 60 years
   - Minimum annual income: Rs.300,000
   - Eligible employment: Salaried, Self-Employed, Business

2. REQUIRED DOCUMENTS

   - Income proof

3. TERMS & CONDITIONS
   - Sum assured basis age, income and health profile

4. MANDATORY DISCLOSURES (as per RBI / IRDAI norms)

policy_document:
EXL BANK LIMITED - PRODUCT POLICY DOCUMENT
Product: EXL Gold Loan (LN-GOLD)
Category: Personal Loan

1. ELIGIBILITY CRITERIA
   - Age: 18 to 70 years
   - Eligible employment: Salaried, Self-Employed, Business, Retired, Homemaker, Student
   - Maximum loan-to-value (LTV): 75.0%

2. REQUIRED DOCUMENTS
   - PAN & Aadhaar
   - Gold ornaments for pledge

3. TERMS & CONDITIONS
   - Only gold jewellery of 18-22 carat accepted
   - Loan amount basis RBI-permitted LTV on gold value

4. MANDATORY DISCLOSURES (as per RBI / IRDAI norms)
   - Pledged gold may be auctioned if the loan is not repaid as per terms.
   - Gold value is assessed as per prevailing market rate and RBI-permitted LTV.

This document is indicative and for internal sales enablement use only.

EXL BANK LIMITED - PRODUCT POLICY DOCUMENT
Product: EXL Prosperity SIP & Mutual Funds (INV-SIP)
Category: Investment

1. ELIGIBILITY CRITERIA
   - Age: 18 to 100 years
   - Eligible employment: Salaried, Self-Employed, Business, Retired, Student

2. REQUIRED DOCUMENTS
   - PAN & Aadhaar

3. TERMS & CONDITIONS

4. MANDATORY DISCLOSURES (as per RBI / IRDAI norms)
